dailyQuizWidget.doneDescription: You've completed today's challenge. Come back tomorrow to keep your streak alive!
dailyQuizWidget.pendingDescription: A new daily challenge is waiting for you.
dailyQuizWidget.title: Daily Quiz

spotlight.title: Start here: Add your first task
spotlight.description: Tap the Add Task button to create your next study step. Click the dark area to dismiss this message.

dayStreak.label: Streak
dayStreak.streakLevelsDescription: Track your daily study consistency to unlock higher fire levels.

motivations.level1: Great start! You've officially begun your learning journey.
motivations.level2: Awesome! Keep the momentum going and see how far you can go!
motivations.level3: Incredible! 7 days of non-stop learning. You are truly serious about this. Keep it up!
motivations.level4: Outstanding! Your consistency is unmatched. You're on the fast track to mastery!
motivations.level5: Legendary! You've reached the peak. Your dedication is an inspiration to other students!

embers.label: Embers
embers.description: You've just started your journey. Stay consistent to build a powerful study habit!

spark.label: Spark
spark.description: The first step is taken! This small spark is the beginning of something great.

flame.label: Flame
flame.description: Momentum is building. Your study fire is starting to burn bright and steady!

blaze.label: Blaze
blaze.description: A full week! You've proven that learning is now a part of your daily lifestyle.

inferno.label: Inferno
inferno.description: Two weeks non-stop! Your focus is burning intense, crushing every academic obstacle.

supernova.label: Supernova
supernova.description: Unbelievable! Your passion has gone cosmic. You are a true master of consistency!
